name: PII redaction check
description: Prevent unsafe prompt inputs from including sensitive personal info.

versions.content: Reject or redact raw SSNs, credit cards, and passwords before prompt assembly.
Example validation: reject email addresses and phone numbers unless the workflow explicitly allows contact data.

name: Structured payload validation
description: Validate required fields before prompt construction.

versions.content: Example validation: require a non-empty topic field for research workflows.
